sacco

Class DrawingBoardWindow

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.DrawingBoardWindow

  • public class DrawingBoardWindow
extends java.lang.Object

      Constructor and Description

      Constructs a new Window that displays the DrawingBoard object passed as a parameter

      Registers a MouseListener object with this window.

      Sets the size of the window to a given width and height

      void setVisible(boolean b) 
      void start()
      Starts the timer, which will call the DrawingBoard's step method incrementally
      void stop()
      Stops the timer, pausing the program.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DrawingBoardWindow

        public DrawingBoardWindow(DrawingBoard board)
        Constructs a new Window that displays the DrawingBoard object passed as a parameter
        Parameters:
        board - - the DrawingBoard object to display

      • DrawingBoardWindow

        public DrawingBoardWindow(DrawingBoard board,
                  boolean isVisible)

    • Method Detail

      • setSize

        public void setSize(int width,
           int height)
        Sets the size of the window to a given width and height
        Parameters:
        width - - the window's new width
        height - - the window's new height

      • getLocation

        public java.awt.Point getLocation()

      • exitOnClose

        public void exitOnClose()

      • setTitle

        public void setTitle(java.lang.String title)

      • getWidth

        public int getWidth()

      • getHeight

        public int getHeight()

      • start

        public void start()
        Starts the timer, which will call the DrawingBoard's step method incrementally

      • stop

        public void stop()
        Stops the timer, pausing the program.

      • setDelay

        public void setDelay(int delay)
        Sets the delay between calls to the step method.
        Parameters:
        delay - - the number of milliseconds between calls to the step method. Caution: this is an unprecise timer

      • getFrame

        public javax.swing.JFrame getFrame()

      • registerKeyboardListener

        public void registerKeyboardListener(KeyboardListener k)
        Registers a KeyboardListener object with this window. When a key is pressed or released, the KeyboardListeners onKeyPress or onKeyRelease is called
        Parameters:
        k - - The KeyboardListener to register

      • removeKeyboardListener

        public void removeKeyboardListener(KeyboardListener k)
        Unregisters the KeyboardListener from this window. onKeyPress and onKeyRelease will no longer be called.
        Parameters:
        k - - the KeyboardListener to unregister

      • registerMouseListener

        public void registerMouseListener(MouseListener m)
        Registers a MouseListener object with this window. When a Mouse is pressed, released, or moved the appropriate method is called
        Parameters:
        m - - The MouseListener to register

      • removeMouseListener

        public void removeMouseListener(MouseListener m)
        Unregisters the MouseListener from this window.
        Parameters:
        k - - the MouseListener to unregister

      • setLocation

        public void setLocation(int x,
               int y)
        Sets the location of the Window on the desktop
        Parameters:
        x - - the x location of the Window
        y - - the y location of the Window

        public void setResizable(boolean b)

      • setVisible

        public void setVisible(boolean b)

      • toFront

        public void toFront()

      • repaint

        public void repaint()
